requirements.full_sentence:
Short title and commencement
(1) These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: (2) These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') excluding Small Finance Banks
(SFBs), Local Area Banks (LABs), Payments Banks (PBs) and Regional Rural
Banks (RRBs).
requirements.object: banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') excluding Small Finance Banks (SFBs),

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The restrictions on further financial accommodation to wilful defaulters and
provisions regarding large defaulters contained in these Directions, shall apply to
all entities regulated by the Reserve Bank, irrespective of whether they fall within
the definition of 'lender' as provided in these Directions or not.
requirements.object: regulated by the Reserve Bank, irrespective of whether they fall within the definition of 'lender' as provided in these Directio

requirements.full_sentence:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, the following definitions shall apply, unless the context
otherwise requires:
Explanation: The Review Committee shall not be comprised of members who
are part of the Identification Committee.
requirements.object: who are part of the Identification Committee

conditions: if any application
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 1: An account shall be treated as suit filed if any application,
appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery
proceedings.
requirements.object: filed if any application, appeal or execution is pending in continuation of the original recovery proceedings

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 2: Suit filed accounts shall be deemed to include accounts in
which proceedings under the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial
Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002 or any other
proceedings for recovery of the dues from the borrower or any other person
liable to make payment of a debt under Acts governing co-operative societies
are initiated and pending, and shall include the account of a debtor against
whom resolution or liquidation proceedings have been initiated and are
continuing.
requirements.object: accounts in which proceedings under the Securitisation and Reconstruction of Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interes

requirements.full_sentence: (i) "borrower" shall mean one who has availed credit facility from a bank;
requirements.object: availed credit facility from a bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) "credit facility" shall mean any fund based or non-fund-based facility, including
off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which
a bank has extended to the borrower.
requirements.object: or non-fund-based facility, including off- balance sheet items like derivatives, guarantees and letters of credit, which a bank ha

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) "credit information company" (CIC) shall mean a company that has been
granted a certificate of registration under Section 5 of the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005.
requirements.object: has been granted a certificate of registration under Section 5 of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) "default" shall have the same meaning assigned to it in the Reserve Bank of
India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
<image>
requirements.object: assigned to it in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 <image>

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) "director" shall mean the director of a company which was classified as a large
defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the
time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / its directors
led to the default.
requirements.object: a company which was classified as a large defaulter / wilful defaulter and who was associated with the company at the time when t

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) "director identification number (DIN)" shall have the meaning assigned to it
under the Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: to it under the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence: (vii) "diversion of funds" shall mean and includes the under- noted occurrences:
requirements.object: under- noted occurrences:

requirements.full_sentence: (viii) "guarantor" shall mean a person / entity who has guaranteed the credit facility.
requirements.object: entity who has guaranteed the credit facility

requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) "identification committee" shall mean the committee constituted by a bank for
identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of:
requirements.object: by a bank for identifying a wilful defaulter and shall comprise of:

requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where
<image>
there is only one Whole-Time Director other than the MD & CEO/ CEO or
equivalent official, such Whole-Time Director may be part of the review
committee if the post of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant.
requirements.object: review committee if the post of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant

requirements.full_sentence:
In
such cases an official one rank below the Whole-Time Director may chair the
identification committee, with two senior officials as members, not more than
one rank below the chairperson of the committee.
requirements.object: with two senior officials as members, not more than one rank below the chairperson of the committee

conditions: Provided that in respect of credit facilities below a suitable threshold
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in respect of credit facilities below a suitable threshold, a bank
(excluding a foreign bank) may, as per their board-approved policy, set up the
Identification Committee, with an officer just below the rank of the Whole-Time
Director as chairperson and two senior officials as members, not more than
two ranks below the chairperson of the committee.
requirements.object: facilities below a suitable threshold, a bank (excluding a foreign bank) may, as per their board-approved policy, set up the Iden

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank (excluding a foreign
bank) may form multiple identification committees under this instruction.
requirements.object: under this instruction

requirements.full_sentence:
(x) "independent director" shall have the meaning assigned to it under the
Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: to it under the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
(xi) "large defaulter" shall mean a defaulter with an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore
and above, and -
requirements.object: an outstanding amount of ₹1 crore and above, and -

requirements.full_sentence:
(xii) "lender" shall mean any of the following entities which has granted a credit
facility to the borrower:
requirements.object: following entities which has granted a credit facility to the borrower:

requirements.full_sentence:
(xiii) "nominee director" shall mean a director nominated by a lender, a regulatory
authority, or the Central or a State Government.
requirements.object: by a lender, a regulatory authority, or the Central or a State Government

requirements.full_sentence:
(xiv) "promoter" shall mean a person who has been named as such in a prospectus
or is identified by the company in the annual return, and
requirements.object: has been named as such in a prospectus or is identified by the company in the annual return, and

requirements.full_sentence:
(xv) "review committee" shall mean the committee constituted by a bank for the
purpose of reviewing the proposal of the Identification Committee and shall
comprise of:
requirements.object: by a bank for the purpose of reviewing the proposal of the Identification Committee and shall comprise of:

conditions: Where the post of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant
requirements.full_sentence:
Where the post of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official is vacant,
the Review Committee shall be constituted with a Whole-Time Director in place
of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official.
requirements.object: Whole-Time Director in place of MD & CEO / CEO or equivalent official

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, Review Committee
shall be chaired by independent directors or non-executive directors or
equivalent officials.
requirements.object: directors or non-executive directors or equivalent officials

conditions: Provided that in respect of credit facilities below a threshold
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Provided that in respect of credit facilities below a threshold, a bank (excluding
a foreign bank) may, as per their board-approved policy constitute a Review
Committee with an officer of the rank of Whole-Time Director or equivalent
official as the chairperson and two senior officials as members, not more than
two ranks below the chairperson of the committee.
requirements.object: facilities below a threshold, a bank (excluding a foreign bank) may, as per their board-approved policy constitute a Review Commi

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank (excluding a foreign
bank) may form multiple review committees under this clause.
requirements.object: under this clause

requirements.full_sentence:
Policy for Implementation of these Directions
A bank shall frame a Board approved policy for the implementation of these
Directions, which shall inter alia include the following:
requirements.object: policy for the implementation of these Directions, which shall inter alia include the following:

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) non-discriminatory criteria based on which the photographs of persons
classified and declared as wilful defaulter shall be published;

Mechanism for Identification and Classification of Wilful Defaulters
(1) A bank shall identify and classify a person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following
the procedure enumerated in these Directions.
requirements.object: person as a 'wilful defaulter' by following the procedure enumerated in these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
The identification of the wilful default
should be made keeping in view the track record of the borrowers and should not be
decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents.
requirements.object: view the track record of the borrowers and should not be decided on the basis of isolated transactions / incidents

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The default to be categorised as wilful must be intentional, deliberate,
calculated and meeting the conditions set out in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above.
requirements.object: and meeting the conditions set out in paragraph 3 (1) (xviii) above

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The evidence of wilful default shall be examined by an Identification
Committee.
requirements.object: Identification Committee

conditions:
If the Identification Committee is satisfied that an event of wilful default has
occurred
requirements.timeline:
within 21 days of issuance
of show cause notice
requirements.full_sentence:
(4) If the Identification Committee is satisfied that an event of wilful default has
occurred, it shall issue a show-cause notice to borrower / guarantor / promoter /
director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the
affairs of the entity, and call for the submissions from them within 21 days of issuance
of show cause notice.
requirements.object: to borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and responsible for the management of the affairs

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall disclose to them all materials and information
on which show cause notice is based.
requirements.object: materials and information on which show cause notice is based

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Director (s) / persons who are in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity means who were associated with the company
/ entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity
led to the default.
requirements.object: the company / entity at the time when the acts of omission or commission by the company / entity led to the default

conditions: where satisfied
requirements.full_sentence:
(5) After considering the submissions and where satisfied, the Identification
Committee shall make a proposal to the Review Committee for classification as a
wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing.
requirements.object: the Review Committee for classification as a wilful defaulter by explaining the reasons in writing

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The borrower / guarantor / promoter / director / persons who are in charge and
responsible for the management of the affairs of the entity shall thereafter be suitably
advised about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons
requirements.object: about the proposal to classify them as wilful defaulter along with the reasons

requirements.full_sentence:
Review of accounts for identification of wilful default
(1) A bank shall examine the 'wilful default' aspect in all Non-Performing Assets
(NPA) accounts with outstanding amount of ₹25 lakh and above or as may be notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
requirements.object: aspect in all Non-Performing Assets (NPA) accounts with outstanding amount of ₹25 lakh and above or as may be notified by

conditions: If wilful default is observed in the internal preliminary screening
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) If wilful default is observed in the internal preliminary screening, a bank shall
complete the process of classification/ declaring the borrower as a wilful defaulter by
following the mechanism set out in Paragraph 5, within six months of the account
being classified as NPA in accordance with the instructions regarding asset
classification contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Income
Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: classification/ declaring the borrower as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in Paragraph 5, within six mon

conditions:
where 'wilful default' was not observed during the initial
examination as mentioned at sub-paragraphs (1) and (2)
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In respect of accounts where 'wilful default' was not observed during the initial
examination as mentioned at sub-paragraphs (1) and (2), the aspects regarding 'wilful
default' shall be subsequently re-examined in terms of the Board approved policy of
the bank at a periodicity as may be specified by the Board.
requirements.object: terms of the Board approved policy of the bank at a periodicity as may be specified by the Board

conditions: If the wilful defaulter is a natural person
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 2: If the wilful defaulter is a natural person, all entities in which he is
associated as promoter, or director, or as one in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity shall be deemed to be associated.
requirements.object: associated

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation 3: In cases where the existing promoters are replaced by new promoters
in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed
Assets) Directions, 2025 and the borrower company is totally delinked from such
erstwhile promoters/ management, lenders may take a view on restructuring such
accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal
proceedings against the erstwhile promoters/ management.
requirements.object: restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal proceedings against the erstwhil

conditions: where criminal proceedings have been initiated
requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In cases where criminal proceedings have been initiated, removal of the name
of a wilful defaulter from the List of Wilful Defaulters (LWD) shall be without
prejudice to the continuation of criminal proceedings against the wilful
<image>
defaulter.
requirements.object: the continuation of criminal proceedings against the wilful <image> defaulter

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Publishing of photographs of wilful defaulters - A bank shall formulate a non-
discriminatory board-approved policy that clearly sets out the criteria based on which
the photographs of persons classified and declared as wilful defaulter shall be
published.
requirements.object: board-approved policy that clearly sets out the criteria based on which the photographs of persons classified and decl

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Penal and other measures against wilful defaulters - The penal measures
mentioned below shall be implemented by a bank in the case of any person / entity
classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:
requirements.object: bank in the case of any person / entity classified as wilful defaulter by any lender:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) No additional credit facility shall be granted by the bank to the wilful defaulter
or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated.
requirements.object: bank to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The bar on additional credit facility to the wilful defaulter or any entity with
which the wilful defaulter is associated shall be effective for a period of one
year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the List of
Wilful Defaulters by the lenders.
requirements.object: period of one year after the name of the wilful defaulter has been removed from the List of Wilful Defaulters by the lenders

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) No credit facility shall be granted by the bank for floating of new ventures to
the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for
a period of five years after the name of wilful defaulter has been removed from
the List of Wilful Defaulters by the lenders.
requirements.object: bank for floating of new ventures to the wilful defaulter or any entity with which the wilful defaulter is associated for a period o

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The restructuring of wilful defaulters or any entity with which a wilful defaulter
is associated shall be as per the stipulations contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: stipulations contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the penal provisions mentioned above shall cease to be applicable on
the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters.
requirements.object: on the associated entities when they are no longer associated with the wilful defaulters

requirements.full_sentence:
Provision for a transparent mechanism
A bank shall put in place a transparent mechanism for the entire process of
identification of wilful defaulters so that the penal provisions are applied in a fair
manner and the scope for discretion is obviated.
requirements.object: transparent mechanism for the entire process of identification of wilful defaulters so that the penal provisions are applied in a fair

requirements.full_sentence:
Role of Internal Audit
(1) A bank shall require their internal auditors to specifically look into adherence
to instructions for classifying a borrower as a wilful defaulter.
requirements.object: to specifically look into adherence to instructions for classifying a borrower as a wilful defaulter

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Audit Committee of the bank shall periodically review the cases of wilful
default and recommend steps to be taken to prevent such occurrences and their early
detection should these occur.
requirements.object: of wilful default and recommend steps to be taken to prevent such occurrences and their early detection should these occ

requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall focus on identifying root causes of
wilful default and addressing deficiencies, if any, in the wilful defaulter classification
process adopted by the bank.
requirements.object: causes of wilful default and addressing deficiencies

conditions:
When a default happens in making payment / repayment by the principal
debtor
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) When a default happens in making payment / repayment by the principal
debtor, a bank shall be able to proceed against the guarantor even without exhausting
the remedies against the principal debtor.
requirements.object: against the guarantor even without exhausting the remedies against the principal debtor

conditions:
In case the said guarantor refuses to comply with the demand made by the
bank
requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In case the said guarantor refuses to comply with the demand made by the
bank, such guarantor shall also be considered for classification as a wilful defaulter
by following the mechanism as set out in Paragraphs 5 and 6.
requirements.object: classification as a wilful defaulter by following the mechanism as set out in Paragraphs 5 and 6

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) While dealing with the wilful default of a single borrowing company in a Group,
a bank shall consider the track record of the individual company, with reference to its
repayment performance to the bank.
requirements.object: of the individual company, with reference to its repayment performance to the bank

conditions: when invoked by the bank
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where guarantees furnished by the
companies within the Group on behalf of the wilfully defaulting units are not honoured
when invoked by the bank, such Group companies should also be considered for
classification as willful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in Paragraphs 5
and 6.
requirements.object: classification as willful defaulter by following the mechanism set out in Paragraphs 5 and 6

requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Large Defaulters
(1) A bank shall submit information in Annex I to all credit information companies
(CICs) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:
requirements.object: I to all credit information companies (CICs) in respect of the large defaulters at monthly intervals:

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) For calculating the threshold of ₹1 crore, the unapplied interest, if any, shall
also be included.

In the case of suit-filed accounts, the threshold shall relate to the
amount for which the suits have been filed.
requirements.object: for which the suits have been filed

requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting and Dissemination of Credit Information on Wilful Defaulters
(1) A bank shall submit at monthly intervals, information in Annex II to all credit
information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:
requirements.object: information in Annex II to all credit information companies in respect of the wilful defaulters:

conditions:
when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time
requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) a LWD in respect of non-suit filed accounts
(2) The bank shall inform all credit information companies the removal of the name
of the wilful defaulter from the LWD, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the
date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified
by Reserve Bank of India from time to time, subject to Paragraph 13(2).
requirements.object: companies the removal of the name of the wilful defaulter from the LWD, promptly and not later than thirty days, from the date when the outstanding amount falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Cases of wilful defaults at overseas branches of banks incorporated in India
shall be reported, if such disclosure is not prohibited under the laws of the host
country.

conditions:
where the bank has entered into a compromise
settlement with the borrower
requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of compromise settlements
(1) Any account included in LWD, where the bank has entered into a compromise
settlement with the borrower, shall be removed from the LWD only when the borrower
has fully paid the compromise amount.
requirements.object: LWD only when the borrower has fully paid the compromise amount

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Till such time as only part payment is made, name of the borrower shall not be
<image>
removed from the LWD even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the
threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time.
requirements.object: the LWD even if the outstanding amount becomes less than the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India fro

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The compromise settlement with the wilful defaulter shall satisfy the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In cases where a bank decides to cancel a compromise settlement due to non-
adherence to the terms of the settlement and revises the amount payable by the
borrower, the reporting shall be with reference to the revised amount.
requirements.object: the revised amount

requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of defaulted loans transferred
(1) Before transferring a defaulted loan with outstanding of ₹25 lakh and above,
irrespective of its classification as NPA, to other transferees, a bank shall internally
conduct a comprehensive investigation from a wilful default perspective.
requirements.object: investigation from a wilful default perspective

requirements.full_sentence:
This process
need not necessarily involve a two-stage committee but should ensure a thorough
examination of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan.
requirements.object: of wilful default aspects for each defaulted loan

conditions: where wilful default is observed
requirements.full_sentence:
(2) In a case where wilful default is observed, the bank shall complete the process
of classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in
Paragraph 5, and report it in the LWD to credit information companies, before
transferring the asset to the transferee(s).
requirements.object: classification of the borrower as wilful defaulter as per mechanism set out in Paragraph 5, and report it in the LWD to credit

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The details of the reporting done must be conveyed to the transferee(s), and
they shall be responsible for reporting it to the credit information companies
thereafter.
requirements.object: it to the credit information companies thereafter

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Transfer of the defaulted loan shall not be treated as recovery for the purpose
of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to
credit information companies, as the loan amount is not yet fully recovered.
requirements.object: for the purpose of calculating the threshold limit for classification as wilful defaulter and reporting to credit information c

conditions:
in case of a loan in which wilful default has been
observed
requirements.full_sentence:
(5) A bank, which is a transferee in case of a loan in which wilful default has been
observed, shall continue to report the account as a wilful defaulter until the balance
remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the
transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India
from time to time, subject to the provisions contained in Paragraph 13.
requirements.object: account as a wilful defaulter until the balance remaining to be recovered in their account plus the amount written off by the transferor falls below the threshold of ₹25 lakh or as notified by Reserve Bank of India from time to time

conditions: in case of a company

in case of entity
(other than companies)
requirements.full_sentence:
Treatment of accounts where resolution is done under Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code (IBC) / resolution framework Directions issued by the
Reserve Bank
(1) In case an account which is included in LWD and has subsequently undergone
liquidation or where the resolution [either under IBC or under the Reserve Bank of
India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025] results
in a change in the management and control of the entity / business enterprise, the
name of such a borrower or guarantor who were classified as wilful defaulter [which
includes in case of a company, its promoters and the director (s), and in case of entity
(other than companies), persons who are in charge and responsible for the
management of the affairs of the entity], shall be removed from the LWD after
implementation of the resolution plan under IBC or the Reserve Bank of India
(Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: LWD after implementation of the resolution plan under IBC or the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Resolution of Stressed

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The penal measures as detailed in Paragraph 7(3) shall not be applicable to
such entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan
involving change in ownership, under the IBC or the resolution framework Directions
issued by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: entities / business enterprises after implementation of the resolution plan involving change in ownership, under the IBC or the

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The resolution framework Directions issued by the Reserve Bank shall
mean any of the following Directions:
requirements.object: following Directions:

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank, while furnishing information to credit information companies, shall
ensure the accuracy of the particulars of the directors, and wherever possible, by
cross-checking with the database maintained by the Registrar of Companies.
requirements.object: the particulars of the directors, and wherever possible, by cross-checking with the database maintained by the Registrar of Com

conditions: when invoked
requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting of Guarantors
A bank shall report to credit information companies the details of guarantors who
have failed to honour the commitments thereunder when invoked, as large defaulters
/ wilful defaulters, as the case may be.
requirements.object: companies the details of guarantors who have failed to honour the commitments thereunder when invoked, as large defaulter

requirements.full_sentence:
The details shall be reported as per Annex I
and II.
requirements.object: Annex I and II

conditions:
In case of business enterprises registered as companies under the Companies
Act
requirements.full_sentence:
Reporting of Directors
(1) In case of business enterprises registered as companies under the Companies
Act, 2013, a bank shall also report in the Director column of Annex I and II, the full
names of the directors to facilitate better identity of persons concerned, subject to the
provisions of these Directions.
requirements.object: Director column of Annex I and II, the full names of the directors to facilitate better identity of persons concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) To ensure that directors are correctly identified and in no case, persons whose
names appear to be similar to the names of directors appearing in the LWD are
wrongfully denied credit facilities on such grounds, the bank shall include the Director
Identification Number (DIN) as one of the fields in the data submitted in Annex I and
II, by them to credit information companies.
requirements.object: Number (DIN) as one of the fields in the data submitted in Annex I and II, by them to credit information companies

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) While carrying out the credit appraisal, a bank shall verify as to whether the
name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the
management of affairs of the entity appears in the list of large defaulters / LWD by
way of reference to DIN / PAN, etc.
requirements.object: the name of any of the directors of a company / guarantors / persons in charge of the management of affairs of the entity appears

conditions: In case of any doubt arising on account of identical names
requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) In case of any doubt arising on account of identical names, the bank shall use
independent sources for confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking
a declaration from the borrowing company.
requirements.object: confirmation of the identity of directors rather than seeking a declaration from the borrowing company

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A bank shall closely monitor the end-use of funds and obtain certificates from
borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which
they were obtained.
requirements.object: of funds and obtain certificates from borrowers certifying that the funds have been utilised for the purpose for which the

conditions: In case of the wrong certification by the borrowers
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of the wrong certification by the borrowers, the bank
shall consider initiating appropriate legal proceedings, including criminal
proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers.
requirements.object: proceedings, including criminal proceedings wherever necessary, against the borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The requirements and related appropriate measures in ensuring the end-use
of funds by a bank shall form a part of its loan policy document.
requirements.object: its loan policy document

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) In cases of project financing, a bank should ensure end use of funds by, inter
alia, obtaining certification from the Chartered Accountants for the purpose.
requirements.object: funds by, inter alia, obtaining certification from the Chartered Accountants for the purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
The
bank must, however, not just depend on the certificates issued by the Chartered
Accountants but also strengthen their credit risk management system and internal
controls to enhance the quality of their loan portfolio.
requirements.object: depend on the certificates issued by the Chartered Accountants but also strengthen their credit risk management system and interna

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in all cases,
especially in the case of short-term corporate / clean loans, such an approach must
be supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of the bank itself, and to the extent
possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whose integrity and
reliability are above board.
requirements.object: diligence' on the part of the bank itself, and to the extent possible, such loans must be limited only to those borrowers whos

conditions:
In case any falsification of accounts on the part of the borrowers is observed
by a bank
requirements.full_sentence:
Role of Statutory Auditors
(1) In case any falsification of accounts on the part of the borrowers is observed
by a bank, and the auditors are found to be negligent or deficient in conducting the
audit, the bank shall consider lodging a formal complaint against the statutory auditors
of the borrowers with the National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) / Institute of
Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) to enable them to examine and fix
accountability of the auditor.
requirements.object: complaint against the statutory auditors of the borrowers with the National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) / Institute

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Pending disciplinary action by NFRA / ICAI, the complaints shall be forwarded
to the Reserve Bank (Department of Supervision, Central Office) and Indian Banks'
Association (IBA).
requirements.object: Reserve Bank (Department of Supervision, Central Office) and Indian Banks' Association (IBA)

requirements.full_sentence:
Before reporting to the Reserve Bank and IBA, a bank shall satisfy
itself of the involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an
opportunity of being heard.
requirements.object: involvement of concerned auditors and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

requirements.full_sentence:
In this regard, the bank should follow normal procedures
and processes, which shall be suitably recorded.

(3) Based on such information received from a bank, IBA shall, in turn, prepare a
caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this
aspect before assigning any work to them.
requirements.object: a caution list of such auditors for circulation among the lenders, who shall consider this aspect before assigning any work to them

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) With a view to monitoring the end-use of funds, if the bank desires a specific
certification from the borrowers' auditors regarding diversion / siphoning of funds by
the borrowers, the bank should award a separate mandate to the auditors for the
purpose.
requirements.object: to the auditors for the purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
To facilitate such certification by the auditors, the bank shall ensure that
appropriate covenants in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award
of such a mandate by the bank to the auditor.
requirements.object: in the loan agreements are incorporated to enable the award of such a mandate by the bank to the auditor

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Depending upon the nature of the borrowers' acts underlying the wilful default
and the quality of evidence available with the bank in the normal course, a bank shall
consider commissioning a forensic audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their
books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above a threshold fixed
by the board approved policy of the bank.
requirements.object: audit of the affairs of the borrowers and their books of accounts, in respect of accounts with an outstanding above

conditions:
in case of wilful defaults
also there should be some accountability for the third parties engaged by a bank
requirements.full_sentence:
Role of third parties
(1) As prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management in
Commercial Banks (including Regional Rural Banks) and All India Financial
Institutions) Directions, 2024 (as updated from time to time), in case of wilful defaults
also there should be some accountability for the third parties engaged by a bank, if
they have played a vital role in credit sanction / disbursement and are found negligent
or deficient in their work or have facilitated the wilful default by the borrower.
requirements.object: the third parties engaged by a bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A bank shall forward the details of these third parties to the Indian Banks'
Association (IBA) for records, regardless of the membership status of the bank with
the IBA.
requirements.object: these third parties to the Indian Banks' Association (IBA) for records, regardless of the membership status of the bank with th

requirements.full_sentence:
Based on such information, IBA shall, in turn, prepare caution lists of such
third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of Reserve Bank who shall
consider this aspect before assigning any work to them.
requirements.object: caution lists of such third parties and circulate to all the regulated entities of Reserve Bank who shall consider this aspect befo

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Before reporting to IBA, a bank shall satisfy itself of the involvement of
concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard.
requirements.object: involvement of concerned third parties and also provide them with an opportunity of being heard

requirements.full_sentence:
In
this regard, a bank shall follow due process, which shall be suitably recorded.
requirements.object: shall be suitably recorded

requirements.full_sentence:
The directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions, instructions,
and guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to remain repealed.

(2) Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
requirements.object: affect:

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
Application of other laws not barred
(1) The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
Interpretations
(1) For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
